propositions: Render a read-only single-column finding-centric audit page at /ticket/<id> built from native <details>/<summary> with no JS.
Sticky gate-status strip shows all three gate verdicts (plan, completion, code) simultaneously with magnitude counts and in-page anchor jumps, with a 'not run' chip for absent gates.
Detail sections render in fixed canonical order plan -> completion -> code regardless of which gate failed, encoding severity via strip and colored headings rather than reordering.
Plan-review finding rows expand in place to the full four-pass provenance (Finding / Verification / Decision / Coaching); code-review rows render only fields present, degrading gracefully.

A neutral per-finding threshold meter fills a 0-1 bar to priority with a tick at the finding's own persisted block_threshold and inherits decision-series color, falling back to a 'threshold not recorded (v1)' caption when values are absent.
Findings are grouped into four canonical decision series (blocking, advisory incl. overflow, dropped, indeterminate) with blocking expanded and others collapsed-and-counted, sorted by priority.
